title: PCR master mix distribution
author: Iva Pitelkova
description: This is a basic protocol that can be used for distributing master mix for PCR.
steps_raw: This is a basic protocol that can be used for distributing master mix for PCR.
materials_raw: Opentrons 6 Tube Rack with Falcon 50 mL Conical
